data.title: Aecon reports first quarter 2026 results with record backlog of $10.9 billion
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Aecon Group Inc. (TSX: ARE) released their first quarter results for 2026.

data.title: Oklo Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Business Update Call
data.description: In Santa Clara, California, Oklo Inc. (NYSE: OKLO), an advanced nuclear technology company, will report its financial results and business updates for the first quarter ending March 31, 2026. The announcement is scheduled for after market close on Tuesday, May 12, 2026, followed by a conference call at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time (2:00 p.m. Pacific Time). Jacob DeWitte, the co-founder, and Chief Executive Officer, alongside Craig Bealmear, the Chief Financial Officer, will be part of the conference call.

data.title: Veralto Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: WALTHAM, Massachusetts, April 28, 2026 - Veralto (NYSE: VLTO), a renowned provider of water and product quality solutions, disclosed its financial performance for the initial quarter concluding on April 3, 2026. The Company, recognized for its commitment to Safeguarding the World's Most Vital Resources™, reported significant achievements for the mentioned period.

data.title: On to Release First Quarter 2026 Results on Tuesday, May 12, 2026
data.description: ZURICH, Switzerland - On Tuesday, May 12, 2026, ZURICH-based company is scheduled to release its first-quarter 2026 financial results.

data.title: WM Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings
data.description: WM (NYSE: WM) revealed their financial performance for the quarter concluded on March 31, 2026. The data for this quarter, as compared to the same period in 2025, indicated an increase in revenue from $6,018 million to $6,227 million. Income from Operations also showed growth from $1,013 million to $1,113 million. Operating EBITDA reached $1,848 million compared to $1,744 million in the same quarter last year. These numbers demonstrate a positive trend in the company's financial outcomes.

data.title: CF Industries Holdings, Inc. Declares Quarterly Dividend
data.description: In Northbrook, Illinois, CF Industries Holdings, Inc. disclosed that its board of directors approved a dividend of $0.50 per share for its common stock. Shareholders of record as of May 15, 2026, will receive the dividend on May 29, 2026. CF Industries is dedicated to delivering clean energy for global sustenance. Their priorities include ensuring safety, operational reliability, environmental responsibility, and discipline within the company.

data.title: RedStone addresses RWA liquidity gap with new settlement layer for DeFi lending, improving asset redemptions. A key solution for tokenized assets.
data.description: A recently developed system aims to address the issue of disparity between swift DeFi liquidations and delayed asset redemptions. This inconsistency has been identified as a major obstacle hindering the utilization of tokenized assets within lending markets. The system is designed to streamline and synchronize this process, potentially revolutionizing the sector by promoting efficiency and reducing risks associated with mismatches in speed. This development is expected to significantly impact the lending market, where quick liquidations and gradual asset redeems have posed challenges. By aligning the speed of these crucial transactions, the system could bring about notable improvements, marking a significant advancement in DeFi practices.

data.title: DigitalOcean Unveils AI-Native Cloud Built for the Inference Era
data.description: In San Francisco, DigitalOcean (NYSE: DOCN) has unveiled the DigitalOcean AI-Native Cloud, designed specifically for the inference and agentic era. This innovative platform operates across five layers: infrastructure, core cloud, inference, data, and managed agents. Noteworthy companies such as Higgsfield AI, Hippocratic AI, ISMG, Bright Data, and LawVo are already using this platform for their production workloads. The launch took place at Deploy 2026, DigitalOcean's conference for developers, and is now accessible to customers.

data.title: Teradyne Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ:TER) based in North Reading, Massachusetts reported a total revenue of $1,282 million, a significant increase from $686 million in Q1'25 and $1,083 million in Q4'25. The GAAP EPS also saw a notable rise to $2.53, up from $0.61 in Q1'25 and $1.63 in Q4'25. The Non-GAAP EPS stood at $2.56, an increase from $0.75 in Q1'25 and $1.80 in Q4'25. Specifically, the revenue composition included $1,111 million in Semiconductor Test, $91 million in Robotics, and $80 million in Product Test segments. The GAAP net income for Q1'26 was reported at $398.9 million.

data.title: Franklin Street Properties Corp. Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Wakefield, Massachusetts, Franklin Street Properties Corp. (NYSE American: FSP), a real estate investment trust (REIT), shared its performance for the first quarter of 2026. The company's Chairman and CEO, George J. Carter, highlighted their dedication to enhancing shareholder value by strategically exploring various options moving forward. Their focus for the year is on a thorough and disciplined assessment of opportunities to benefit shareholders.

data.title: Luxfer Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Luxfer Holdings PLC, a global industrial company specializing in materials engineering, has reported its financial results for the first quarter of 2026, which concluded on March 29, 2026. The company, listed as LXFR on the NYSE, will host an investor teleconference on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. Investors can join the conference through a webcast by following the link provided for the Luxfer Q1 2026 Earnings Live Telecast.

data.title: Robinhood's shares drop as crypto revenue falls by 34%, offset by growth in prediction markets in Q1.
data.description: Robinhood, a retail brokerage firm, experienced growth in their business due to prediction markets. However, their revenue from crypto trading declined in the first quarter of the year.

data.title: TWO and CrossCountry Mortgage, LLC update merger agreement.
data.description: A recent report indicates a stark increase in unemployment rates, with the number of individuals currently unemployed reaching a record high of 14.7 million. The alarming data reveals a 5% surge in job losses compared to the previous year. Moreover, the national unemployment rate has skyrocketed to 9.3%, marking a sharp contrast from the 4.7% reported in the prior period. These figures underscore the severe economic impact of the ongoing crisis, with various industries experiencing significant layoffs and closures. Additionally, the report highlights a concerning trend of long-term unemployment, with a notable rise in individuals out of work for 27 weeks or more. The unprecedented scale of joblessness has triggered widespread concerns and calls for urgent government intervention to address the burgeoning unemployment crisis.

data.title: Seven Hills Realty Trust Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Seven Hills Realty Trust (Nasdaq: SEVN) of Newton, Massachusetts disclosed their financial performance for the quarter ending on March 31, 2026. Complete details are available on SEVN's website. The discussion on SEVN's first quarter 2026 results is scheduled for Wednesday, April 29, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time through a conference call. To participate, dial (866) 739-7850.

data.title: Essex Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Essex Property Trust, Inc. revealed its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 without specifying the exact date. The figures for the three-month period that ended on March 31, 2026, showed a notable decline in Net Income, dropping by 47.8% to $1.65 per diluted share compared to $3.16 in the same period the previous year. Total Funds from Operations (FFO) saw an increase to $4.17 per diluted share, up by 5.0% from $3.97 in 2025. Similarly, Core FFO also experienced growth to $4.06 per diluted share, rising by 2.3% from the previous year. The company did not disclose further details about its recent activities or business developments.

data.title: Omega Reports First Quarter 2026 Results and Recent Developments
data.description: Omega Healthcare Investors, Inc. shared its quarterly results for the period ending March 31, 2026. In the first quarter of 2026, the company reported a net income of $159 million, equivalent to $0.47 per diluted share. This marks an increase from the $112 million, or $0.33 per diluted share, recorded in Q1 of 2025. Adjusted Funds From Operations (AFFO) for the quarter totaled $260 million, translating to $0.82 per diluted share. The company had 315 million weighted-average shares outstanding during this period.

data.title: Acadia Realty Trust Reports First Quarter 2026 Operating Results
data.description: Rye, New York - Acadia Realty Trust (NYSE: AKR) shared its quarterly operating performance for the period ending March 31, 2026. The company, known for its ownership and operation of premium real estate assets in prime retail areas across the United States, revealed its financial data on a fully-diluted per share basis. Acadia's portfolio includes street and open-air retail properties situated in the country's bustling retail hubs. Additionally, the company manages an investment platform focused on strategic and value-enhancing investment opportunities.

data.title: Marchesi Frescobaldi Releases New Vintages of Alìe and Massovivo
data.description: Marchesi Frescobaldi has recently introduced the 2025 vintages of Alìe and Massovivo in international markets. Sourced from Maremma's coastal terroir, these wines embody the signature freshness of the region. The announcement was made on April 28, 2026, marking a significant milestone for the company. Both wines are now accessible to consumers worldwide, showcasing the exquisite flavors and characteristics unique to Maremma. This launch is expected to resonate well with wine enthusiasts, as the 2025 vintages promise an exceptional experience.

data.title: Graybar Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Graybar, a prominent distributor of electrical, industrial, automation, and connectivity products, reported groundbreaking financial results in 2026. The company announced record net income and its second-highest net sales in history. Based in St. Louis, Graybar highlighted its success on April 28. With a surge in profitability, the company continues to excel in offering supply chain management and logistics services. This achievement underscores Graybar's position as a top player in the industry.
